top_signals.title: Treasuries Erase Drop in Oil-Driven Move Tied to Middle East War
top_signals.summary: Treasuries erased declines that pushed the two-year note’s yield to a new 2026 high as the market responded to oil-price fluctuations caused by the US war on Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Rebound From Selloff as Nvidia Leads Big-Tech Gains
top_signals.summary: US stocks bounced back on Monday from the worst rout this year, as a selloff in technology stocks eased and traders assessed flaring tensions in the Middle East, which supported oil prices and energy shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: GE Sees Potential For More China Deals After Summit
top_signals.summary: GE Aerospace remains optimistic that it can secure more aircraft-engine orders from China after President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping met in Beijing last month and manufacturing partner Boeing Co. came home an initial batch of commitments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Starmer: Britain must ‘not stick its head in the sand’ on AI
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer has said Britain must not “stick its head in the sand” on artificial intelligence, with the technology set to fundamentally reshape the UK economy. The Prime Minister used his speech at London Tech Week to unveil a major sovereign computing push, new AI skills programmes and a vision for keeping Britain’s fastest-growing [...]

top_signals.title: South Korea police raid Bithumb over lawmaker hiring favoritism probe: report
top_signals.summary: South Korean lawmaker Kim Byung-gi faces probe over alleged nepotism tied to his son’s crypto jobs as police raid Bithumb's offices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: South Korean stocks end 8% lower as US rate fears hit high-flying Asia
Strategy buys 1,550 Bitcoin after controversial 32 BTC sale
top_signals.summary: Strategy resumed Bitcoin buying by purchasing 1,550 BTC for $101.3 million, bringing its total holdings to 845,256 BTC after last week’s controversial sale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cardo AI Launches Cash Flow Modeling Tool for Asset-Based Finance, with Live Rate Curves Powered by Bloomberg Data
top_signals.summary: Cardo AI today announced a new cash flow modeling tool for asset-based finance and specialty finance, built as a modern alternative to incumbent structured-finance cash flow engines such as Intex. The tool addresses a problem that has constrained analysts for years: engines designed for public ABS deals that do not fit today’s esoteric asset classes [...]
